name: Carrot Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9-inch pan. Beat eggs with sugar until frothy. Gradually beat in oil. Combine dry ingredients, add to mixture in a large bowl and beat together until mixed (batter will be thick). Add carrots, zucchini, and coconut. Beat. Pour into pan. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
ICING: Beat cream cheese (room temperature) and butter together until creamy. Beat in icing sugar, vanilla, and orange rind until creamy. Spread.
